top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    MAX(b.g) AS games_played,
    MAX(b.r) AS runs,
    MAX(b.h) AS hits,
    MAX(b.hr) AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name_given
HAVING MAX(b.g) = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.r) = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.h) = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.hr) = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);

SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    MAX(b.g) AS games_played,
    MAX(b.r) AS runs,
    MAX(b.h) AS hits,
    MAX(b.hr) AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name_given
HAVING MAX(b.g) = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.r) = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.h) = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.hr) = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);

SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    b.g AS games_played,
    b.r AS runs,
    b.h AS hits,
    b.hr AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
WHERE b.g = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
  AND b.r = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
  AND b.h = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
  AND b.hr = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);

SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    MAX(b.g) AS games_played,
    MAX(b.r) AS runs,
    MAX(b.h) AS hits,
    MAX(b.hr) AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name_given
HAVING MAX(b.g) = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.r) = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.h) = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.hr) = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);

SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    b.g AS games_played,
    b.r AS runs,
    b.h AS hits,
    b.hr AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
WHERE (b.g, b.r, b.h, b.hr) = (
    SELECT g, r, h, hr 
    FROM batting 
    ORDER BY g DESC, r DESC, h DESC, hr DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    b.g AS games_played,
    b.r AS runs,
    b.h AS hits,
    b.hr AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
WHERE b.g = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
  AND b.r = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
  AND b.h = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
  AND b.hr = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);

final.sql:
SELECT 
    p.name_given,
    MAX(b.g) AS games_played,
    MAX(b.r) AS runs,
    MAX(b.h) AS hits,
    MAX(b.hr) AS home_runs
FROM player p
JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name_given
HAVING MAX(b.g) = (SELECT MAX(g) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.r) = (SELECT MAX(r) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.h) = (SELECT MAX(h) FROM batting)
   AND MAX(b.hr) = (SELECT MAX(hr) FROM batting);
